code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> Initializing: start_link(Retail_CouponSystem)

    state Initializing {Retail_CouponSystem] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [Retail_PointOfSale]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(Retail_OrderManagement)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [Retail_Inventory]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [Retail_CouponSystem]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {Retail_OrderManagement] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [Retail_CustomerLoyalty]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [Retail_Inventory]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(Retail_CustomerLoyalty)

    %% Session Restoration (Retail_Inventory)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [Retail_PointOfSale]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {Retail_PointOfSale] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Retail_PointOfSale]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {Retail_PointOfSale] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Retail_Inventory]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(Retail_OrderManagement)
        - subscriptions: map(Retail_Inventory)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{Retail_CustomerLoyalty}
        - last_activity: timestamp(Retail_CouponSystem)
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(Retail_CouponSystem)
    IdleTimeout --> [Retail_Inventory]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {Retail_CouponSystem] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {Retail_Inventory] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [Retail_Inventory]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {Retail_Inventory}
        - Fastest: O(Retail_OrderManagement) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {Retail_Inventory}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {Retail_PointOfSale}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为零售客户忠诚度系统（Retail_CustomerLoyalty）设计一个完整的状态机，核心是一个MCP会话生命周期管理器。首先考虑从start_link启动，进入Initializing状态。
明白，Initializing是一个复合状态。我理解为内部需要包含配置加载、传输层初始化和连接建立这些步骤？
对，顺序是LoadConfig → InitTransport → EstablishConnection → SendInitialize → WaitForInitialized，最后收到initialized消息才能进入Connected状态。
好的，Initializing复合状态已绘制完成。现在Connected状态应该是核心工作状态，需要包含哪些子状态？
Connected内部要有Active状态，以及三种操作类型：ResourceOperations、ToolOperations和PromptOperations。Active是中心枢纽，所有操作完成后都要返回Active。
ResourceOperations支持list/read/subscribe，ToolOperations是call_tool，PromptOperations是list/get，这样理解对吗？
正确。另外订阅流程需要独立出来：从Active通过subscribe_resource进入Subscribing，确认后返回Active。
Subscribing复合状态已添加，内部包含RegisterSubscription → SetupWatcher → ConfirmSubscription。Connected部分基本完成了。
现在考虑异常流程。Connected可以进入Paused（暂停）、Reconnecting（重连）、GracefulShutdown（优雅关闭）和AbnormalShutdown（异常关闭）。
Paused和Connected之间是双向的？pause_requested进入Paused，resume_requested返回Connected？
是的。Reconnecting比较复杂，需要设计重连策略，包括退避机制和最大重试次数检查。
Reconnecting复合状态已构建：Backoff → ReconnectAttempt → Success/Failure，Failure后IncrementRetryCount → CheckMaxRetries，below_max回退Backoff，exceeded_max进入Failed。
GracefulShutdown需要完整的清理流程：UnsubscribeResources → DrainPendingRequests → CloseTransport → PersistSession → TerminateProcess，最后回到Retail_PointOfSale。
GracefulShutdown复合状态已完成。AbnormalShutdown的处理流程类似吗？
AbnormalShutdown略有不同：LogError → PersistCrashDump → NotifyDependents → TerminateProcess，最后指向Retail_Inventory而不是Retail_PointOfSale。
已添加。现在需要补充会话持久化机制，我注意到Connected旁边应该有个注释说明ETS/DETS/Mnesia的选择。
对，Session Persistence注释要放在Connected右侧：ETS是内存存储，DETS是磁盘存储，Mnesia支持集群。
注释已添加。还需要在Initializing左侧添加Backend Selection的详细说明吗？
需要。说明三种后端的权衡：Retail_Inventory（ETS）最快但易失，DETS持久但有I/O开销，Retail_PointOfSale（Mnesia）分布式但有CAP权衡。
Backend Selection注释已完成。现在补充ResourceOperations的内部细节？
ResourceOperations内部是Watching循环：resource_changed触发NotificationReceived，然后DeliverNotification，回到Watching。
ResourceOperations复合状态已细化。ToolOperations也需要类似的内部结构吗？
ToolOperations更复杂：Executing进入后，如果是long_running_op就进入InProgress，可以发送ProgressUpdate，最终Complete回到Retail_Inventory。
ToolOperations复合状态已完成，包含进度更新循环。现在需要添加健康检查机制吗？
需要两种健康检查。一种是periodic_health_check触发的SessionValidation：healthy保持Connected，unhealthy进入Failed。另一种是periodic_timer触发的HealthCheck。
HealthCheck和SessionValidation有什么区别？看起来都是健康检查。
你说得对，我需要澄清：SessionValidation是连接级别的验证，而HealthCheck是系统级检查，可能进入Degraded状态。Degraded可以恢复回Connected，或失败进入Failed。
明白了，已添加Degraded状态和恢复路径。现在补充空闲超时和速率限制？
对，Connected在no_activity（Retail_CouponSystem）时进入IdleTimeout，最终session_expired指向Retail_Inventory。
IdleTimeout已添加。速率限制部分呢？
request_rate_exceeded进入RateLimited，backoff_complete可以返回Connected，但如果rate_limit_persistent就进入Failed。
RateLimited状态已完成。现在需要在Reconnecting旁边添加Failover Modes的注释。
对，说明三种故障转移模式：Local重启进程，Remote使用Mnesia副本，Recovery从DETS加载。
Failover Modes注释已添加。还需要Restoration Priority注释吗？
需要，按优先级列出恢复步骤：1.恢复订阅，2.重放pending requests，3.恢复capabilities，4.恢复监控。
Restoration Priority注释已完成。最后需要Session State的详细字段说明吗？

需要，放在Connected右侧。包含：session_id（UUID）、transport_pid、pending_requests（map，Retail_OrderManagement）、subscriptions（map，Retail_Inventory）、capabilities（Retail_CustomerLoyalty）、last_activity（timestamp，Retail_CouponSystem）、backend（ets|dets|mnesia）。
Session State字段注释已添加。让我检查一下整体结构是否完整。
检查一下状态转换：Initializing到Connected是initialized received，Connected到Reconnecting是transport_error，Reconnecting成功是reconnect_success，失败是reconnect_failed（Retail_OrderManagement）。
所有转换关系已核对正确。GracefulShutdown和AbnormalShutdown的终点分别是Retail_PointOfSale和Retail_Inventory，这个区分有什么特殊含义吗？
优雅关闭时会话数据已持久化，可以安全回到POS系统；异常关闭时数据可能损坏，需要库存系统（Retail_Inventory）介入进行数据一致性检查。
理解了这个设计意图。整个状态机看起来已经很完整了，覆盖了正常操作、暂停恢复、重连策略、优雅关闭、异常处理和会话持久化。
确认无误。这个设计支持Retail_CustomerLoyalty作为入口，通过Retail_CouponSystem初始化，与Retail_PointOfSale交互，在异常时由Retail_OrderManagement和Retail_Inventory处理恢复。
最终状态图已完成，包含4个主要复合状态（Initializing、Connected、Reconnecting、Subscribing、GracefulShutdown、AbnormalShutdown）、多个操作子状态、完整的异常处理路径和4个关键注释。
